Buttons

Get buttons (markups) for

Module of the create button for the menu and Bot in general.

class buttons.Buttons[source]

Class for get the buttons in chats.

static get_user_tickets(username)[source]

Markup-button (Inline) of the Bot for the user’s history of “TICKETS”.

username – User’s name – username.

Returns:

Tuple with data.

Return type:

tuple

static get_users_tickets_for_admin()[source]

Markup-button (Inline) of the Bot for the admin history of “TICKETS” of the users.

Returns:

tuple of the tickets and Markup-buttons.

Return type:

tuple
